heading: Sovereign immunity and trusteeship rights unaffected

children.text: affecting, modifying, diminishing, or otherwise impairing the sovereign immunity from suit enjoyed by an Indian tribe; or
authorizing or requiring the termination of any existing trust responsibility of the United States with respect to the Indian people.
